steps.title: Use the hardship context
steps.content: Trofimov says he has undergone a great deal and then describes being hungry, ill, shaken, and tossed everywhere by fate. The context points to hardships he has lived through.

steps.title: Match the closest meaning
steps.content: Choice A means found or exposed something. Choice B means paid no attention to something. Choice D means communicated something. In this context, undergone means gone through or experienced. The answer is C.
